name: Barbell Reverse Wrist Curl
shortDescription: A wrist flexion exercise performed with a pronated grip to target the forearm extensors.
instructions: Sit on a bench holding a barbell with an overhand grip, forearms resting on your thighs, and wrists hanging over the edge. Extend your wrists upward, lifting the bar, then lower under control.
steps: Sit on a bench and grasp a barbell with an overhand (pronated) grip.
Rest your forearms on your thighs with wrists hanging just beyond your knees.
Begin with your wrists flexed downward.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, lifting the barbell.
Lower under control to the starting position.
commonMistakes: Letting the barbell roll in hands
breathing: Exhale as you curl the bar up, inhale as you lower.
